Template for submitting feature requests to suggest new features for Flask.

# Purpose
This metadata file defines a template for submitting feature requests for the Flask project. It includes sections for describing the proposed feature and providing examples of the problem the feature aims to solve. Users are instructed to replace placeholder comments with detailed information, including links to relevant specifications or previous discussions, and to consider if the problem can be solved without modifying Flask.
